message:
feat(tui): ultra-narrow terminal fallback UX policy (1mfw3.4.4)

Add is_ultra_narrow() check for terminals below 30x6. Below this threshold,
render a compact "terminal too small" message instead of attempting the full
UI. Prevents layout panics and unreadable content at degenerate sizes.
Also restores tui.rs to 4-line stub (merge conflict re-introduced legacy).
4 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
